author: doll-agent
content: Added place(), putmask(), extract() to ferray-core::indexing::extended. place cycles vals[] over mask hits; putmask supports scalar (len==1) or full-length values; extract returns a 1-D array. Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. 7 unit tests cover basic, mismatched, scalar, full-length, and 2D cases.
